name: copilot-cli-extensions
description: Six Copilot CLI extensions: five orchestrators for multi-model workflows (triple-duck parallel critique + consensus; triple-review iterative code review; triple-plan parallel planning + judge merge; debate adversarial 2-model + judge; duck-council 6 role-specialized rubber-ducks + judge synthesis) and zerotrust-sourcecheck (32-role multi-model security council against a GitHub URL or local on-disk directory, with hardened clone/install/build safe-wrapper tools for runtime verification). Each extension returns a markdown instruction packet the calling agent executes via the built-in `task` tool.
